def process_orders(raw_orders):
    cleaned = [o for o in raw_orders if o["status"] != "cancelled"]
    filtered = [o for o in cleaned if o["total"] > 100]
    enriched = [enrich(o) for o in filtered]
    sorted_orders = sorted(enriched, key=lambda o: o["date"])
    formatted = [format_order(o) for o in sorted_orders]
    return formatted

def transform_dataset(records):
    parsed = [parse(r) for r in records]
    valid = [v for v in parsed if v is not None]
    normalized = [normalize(v) for v in valid]
    grouped = group_by_category(normalized)
    flattened = [item for group in grouped.values() for item in group]
    return flattened

def build_report(events):
    raw = [extract(e) for e in events]
    filtered = [r for r in raw if r["severity"] >= 3]
    deduped = list({r["id"]: r for r in filtered}.values())
    sorted_events = sorted(deduped, key=lambda r: r["timestamp"])
    return [serialize(r) for r in sorted_events]
